mapper.select:
SELECT /* BondMgmtMapper.selectBondSaleInfoNum */ SALE_NO AS TEXT , BOND_SEQ_NO AS VALUE FROM MSP_BOND_SALE_MST WHERE 1 = 1
AND SALE_STAT_CD = 'A'
ORDER BY BOND_SEQ_NO

SELECT /* BondMgmtMapper.selectBillYm */
A.BILL_YM AS TEXT , A.BILL_YM AS VALUE FROM MSP_BOND_SALE_STTC A WHERE 1=1 AND A.BOND_SEQ_NO = #{bondSeqNo} ORDER BY A.BILL_YM ASC
